summary: Verified WebRTC call flow fixes for two critical issues: (1) call_request_claimed broadcast to dismiss alerts for other staff, (2) webrtc_end_call handler to end calls on mobile app. All 12 tests PASSED. Fixed a bug: missing `claimed_call_requests` dictionary in webrtc_signaling.py.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Missing `claimed_call_requests` dictionary in webrtc_signaling.py (line 47-50) - was causing NameError when staff accepted call requests

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 12 WebRTC call flow tests passed
success_rate.frontend: N/A - Code structure verification only (Socket.IO event handlers)

seed_data_creation: N/A - Unit tests with mocked data
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebRTC call flow fixes verified. The two critical issues are now addressed: (1) Backend emits `call_request_claimed` to all other staff when one accepts a call request (lines 1222-1233 in webrtc_signaling.py). (2) Backend has `webrtc_end_call` handler (lines 620-685) that emits `call_ended` to the other party. Portal has `call_request_claimed` listener (lines 793-808 in useWebRTCPhone.tsx) that dismisses pending requests. Mobile app has `call_ended` listener (lines 355-361 in SafeguardingCallModal.tsx) that triggers cleanup and closes modal.

webrtc_end_call_handler.details: Backend handler exists at line 620, properly emits call_ended to other party, removes call from active_calls, resets statuses to available

call_request_claimed_broadcast.details: Backend broadcasts call_request_claimed to ALL other staff (not the accepting staff) when one staff accepts a call request

portal_call_request_claimed_listener.details: Portal has socket.on('call_request_claimed') handler that stops ringtone and clears pending request state (only if request_id matches)

mobile_app_call_ended_listener.details: Mobile app has socket.on('call_ended') handler that calls cleanup() to stop streams, close peer connection, disconnect socket, and close modal

bug_fixed.fix: Added missing `claimed_call_requests: Dict[str, dict] = {}` dictionary at line 50
bug_fixed.impact: Without this fix, accept_call_request would crash when staff tried to accept a call request
